attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_JOBS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_DEFINITION_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.DATE_FROM, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.COMMENTS, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.DATE_TO, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.NAME, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION1, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION2, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION3, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION4, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION5, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION6, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION7, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION8, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION9, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION10, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION11, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION12, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION13, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION14, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION15, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION16, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION17, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION18, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION19, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION20, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.BENCHMARK_JOB_FLAG, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.BENCHMARK_JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.EMP_RIGHTS_FLAG, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.APPROVAL_AUTHORITY, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_JOBS STG_CSF_PER_JOBS,
(
select JOB_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_JOBS
minus
select JOB_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_JOBS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.JOB_ID = STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.JOB_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_JOBS.REFRESH_DATETIME
